vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on Backup passwd File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /etc/passwd-, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0644 /etc/passwd-

triage_decision.reason: File permission change on /etc/passwd- is a standard STIG remediation that does not affect system access, SSH, console, or critical services. It follows safe file permission hardening patterns.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: filesystems affected; Minimal risk; only modifies backup file permissions
